meta.calibration: Acquisition prices are calibrated on 1,019 clean player acquisitions, 2010-2026. Rental (expiring-contract) acquisitions price at x0.52 of comparable term deals; term-and-age multipliers scale the base price. The superstar tier is flagged UNCALIBRATED: true superstars almost never trade, so that tier is extrapolated, not observed.
meta.honest: Trade value = projected surplus over the remaining control years (aged WAR priced at the market $/WAR, minus cap paid). Inherits every market-value caveat: historical WAR vs the current contract, RAPM compression of elite defensemen, single-season noise. Read asset classes and ranges, not decimals.
